approvedBy: Steve explicit queue approval plus Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve approved the four-card Foundation queue and clarified extractor-related cards are queue/spec/preflight only unless separately approved for a no-auth/no-paid run.
notes: Approved only for Foundation-owned extraction runtime readiness: queue contract, source/auth posture, evidence envelope, cost/spend caps, run health, proposal-only Research Inbox/proposed-atom output, and fail-closed proof. Not approved: live extraction, auth-required extraction, paid extraction without Steve approval, OAuth, connector auth, Harlan, Fal, voice, Canva, OpenHuman, broad UI redesign, Drive permission mutation, Agent Feedback auto-send, atom promotion, or backlog mutation from extracted content.
